title: REAL-TIME DRIFT DETECTION IN TIME-SERIES DATA FOR AUTOMATED AI MODEL RE-TRAINING
summary:
Aspects disclosed provide system and method for monitoring a trained artificial intelligence (Al
) model to determine when the Al
 model needs to be re-trained. The system and method provides a framework for detecting when the model's ability to provide accurate predictions for real-time time-series data have trended/drifted away from data used to train the Al
 model. Based on detecting the trend/drift, the system and method will generate an alert indicating at the Al
 model may need to be re-trained.
Atty. Dkt.: 5559.0020000
1



 
 ABST

 19289778

 1

 ABSTRACT

 Aspects disclosed provide system and method for monitoring a trained artificial intelligence (AI) model to determine when the AI model needs to be re-trained. The system and method provides a framework for detecting when the model’s ability to provide accurate predictions for real-time time-series data have trended/drifted away from data used to train the AI model. Based on detecting the trend/drift, the system and method will generate an alert indicating at the AI model may need to be re-trained.
details:
This listing of claims will replace all prior versions, and listings, of claims in the application.
